cards.front: What is the purpose of a point-to-point network?
cards.back: To connect two devices directly to each other using a dedicated communication channel

cards.front: What type of links are used in a point-to-point network?
cards.back: Duplex links allow for simultaneous transmission and reception of data
A duplex link is a communication channel that allows for simultaneous transmission and reception of data in both directions

cards.front: What is the benefit of using duplex links in a point-to-point network?
How many nodes should be connected in the experiment?
cards.back: Three nodes should be connected in the experiment
